message:
feat(refinery): nudge deacon after merge to check stranded convoys (gt-rnzje)

After merging a PR and running convoy checks, the refinery now sends
mail to deacon/ prompting it to run gt convoy stranded. This avoids
waiting up to 10 minutes for the next deacon patrol cycle when a merge
unblocks the next issue in a convoy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
